title: Customizable Storage Box
description: A full-featured storage container generator with dividers, snap-fit lids, rim options, and module bays.
author: 9R

title: Project Box
description: A clean, parametric two-part electronics enclosure with screw posts and a snap-fit cover.
author: gregmarra

title: Super Hexagons Tile
description: Parametric hexagonal tile pattern built from triangular prisms. Adjust count, spacing, base height, and height increments for unique surfaces.
author: jeffbarr

title: Impossible Ring
description: Nested concentric rings with vertical separators. Supports solid bases, partial rings, magnet slots, and multi-extruder coloring.
author: jeffbarr

title: Truchet Tiling Pattern
description: Random tiling pattern inspired by Truchet's Figure 19. Circular or ring overlays on a grid of square tiles with seed control.
author: jeffbarr

title: Overlapping Scales
description: Grid of overlapping 3D scale shapes in ring or filled style. Choose circle, triangle, hexagon, or octagon shapes with adjustable tilt and spacing.
author: jeffbarr

title: Spikes on Raft
description: Cylindrical or pyramidal spikes on a flat raft base. Supports border holes for linking rafts, edge magnets, and wall thickness control.
author: jeffbarr

title: Perturbed Quads Grid
description: Grid of rectangles with random perturbation at vertices. Supports fixed or random heights, vertical or tapered sides, and topographic meeting edges.
author: jeffbarr

title: Nodes & Edges Graph
description: Hex graph pattern of circular, square, or hexagonal nodes connected by flat edges. Adjustable spacing, rim heights, and edge lengths.
author: jeffbarr

title: Talons Tile
description: Grid of talon-shaped protrusions on a flat base. Adjust claw count, radius, height, spacing, and taper.
author: jeffbarr

title: Mirror Shapes
description: Two mirrored halves of parametric shapes joined along a center plane. Adjust shape, size, gap, and mirror axis.
author: jeffbarr

title: Pride Hearts
description: Array of extruded heart shapes in parametric grid layout. Configurable heart size, spacing, height, and multi-extruder color support.
author: jeffbarr

title: Parametric Tile
description: Configurable single or multi-tile pattern. Adjust tile size, border, height, and tiling mode for tessellation experiments.
author: jeffbarr

title: NeoPixel Strip Mount
description: Mounting channel for WS2812B NeoPixel LED strips. Parametric length, width, and clip spacing.
author: jeffbarr

title: Rhombitrihexagonal Tiling
description: Archimedean tiling with triangles, squares, and hexagons. Parametric edge length, height, and gap.
author: jeffbarr

title: Dentist Square
description: Interlocking square-based decorative tile with gap control and height variation.
author: jeffbarr

title: Nodes Graph Variant
description: Alternative graph pattern visualization with nodes and connecting edges. Different layout algorithm from Nodes & Edges.
author: jeffbarr

title: Easy Bolt Generator
description: Generate threaded bolts, nuts, washers, and rods. Supports hundreds of metric (M1–M600) and imperial (UNC/UNF) thread standards.
author: jbruce12000

description: A plastic slot-filler for a smart card port.

title: Gridfinity Vertical Divider
